mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is pinned near zero while CPIAUCSL continues rising, real policy rates fall and inflation compensation should rise, lifting the 10-year Treasury yield over the next month. The effect is strongest if the inflation trend is not matched by a sharp drop in labor demand proxies.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day yield changes are negative or flat in most periods when FEDFUNDS remains near zero and CPIAUCSL is accelerating, or if the sign flips after controlling for labor-market stability.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in RSAFS above its recent trend indicates stronger nominal spending and firmer growth expectations, which should push the 10-year Treasury yield higher within 20 trading days. The signal fails if sales improve only because of price effects while real activity proxies remain weak.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS rises above its 3-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if threshold crossings in RSAFS are followed by negative 20-day yield moves more than 60% of the time, or if the effect disappears when INDPRO and PAYEMS are weak.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in UNRATE combined with slowing PAYEMS signals labor-market deterioration and weaker growth, which should lower the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days as investors price slower activity and lower rate pressure. The effect should be strongest when both series worsen together.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2pp over 2 months while PAYEMS growth turns negative
failure_condition: Reject if combined labor deterioration is not followed by lower 20-day yields in a majority of triggered cases, or if PAYEMS changes alone explain the effect without UNRATE.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO with stable or improving HOUST implies broad production strength and tighter real-side activity, which should raise the 10-year Treasury yield over the next month through stronger growth and inflation expectations. The mechanism fails if industrial output rises while housing collapses, because the mixed signal weakens growth conviction.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum with stable HOUST does not produce positive 20-day yield direction, or if the effect vanishes when HOUST is contracting sharply.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in FEDFUNDS after a prolonged zero-rate period signals imminent tightening and should lift the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 5 trading days as markets reprice the path of policy and term premium. The effect is immediate and should appear before macro activity data can respond.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by at least 0.25pp from its prior level
failure_condition: Reject if policy-rate hikes are not followed by positive 5-day yield direction more often than chance, or if the sign is reversed in tightening episodes after excluding recession periods.

mechanism_narrative: Weak GDPC1 growth combined with falling RSAFS marks a broad demand slowdown, which should push the 10-year Treasury yield lower over a 60-day horizon as investors anticipate slower inflation and easier policy. The signal should be strongest when both measures soften together rather than separately.
failure_condition: Reject if periods with weak GDPC1 and contracting RSAFS are followed by higher 60-day yields, or if the pattern only holds when CPIAUCSL is also falling sharply.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE is below its recent range and PAYEMS is still accelerating, investors should infer resilient labor demand and firmer growth, which raises the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days. This effect is conditional on labor strength not being offset by collapsing production.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls below its 6-month average while PAYEMS 3-month growth stays positive
failure_condition: Reject if low unemployment plus accelerating payrolls does not precede higher 20-day yields, or if the sign disappears once INDPRO is included as a control.

mechanism_narrative: In a disinflation regime, a decline in CPIAUCSL together with a flat FEDFUNDS path should reduce inflation expectations and term premium, pulling the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next month. The effect should fail when inflation re-accelerates or when policy expectations shift upward.
failure_condition: Reject if negative CPIAUCSL trend episodes are not followed by lower 20-day yields, or if the relationship disappears once FEDFUNDS expectations are stable.
